summary: Crisp soundboard recording with Brent’s keyboards front‑and‑center captures an all‑time favorite 1981 performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear, up‑front mix that puts Brent's keyboards in the spotlight and highlights the energy of what they call one of the finest shows of 1981. The soundboard source is praised as “amazing” compared to other distant, tinny versions, making the musical performance shine even more.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews emphasize both an excellent recording and a top‑tier show; weighting favors the strong musical performance, resulting in near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, up‑front mix with Brent’s keyboards prominently placed; far clearer than other soundboard versions that sounded distant and tinny.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the finest 1981 shows, with high energy throughout; reviewers note overall excellence without calling out specific set‑list issues.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work is highlighted as bristling with energy and placed up front in the mix.
